name: Shrimp with Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp and onion by washing the shrimp thoroughly and cutting off any debris or veins.
2. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat until it reaches the smoking point.
3. Add the sliced onions to the hot oil and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, or until they are just beginning to soften.
4. Add the prepared shrimp to the wok and continue stir-frying for another 1-2 minutes, ensuring that the shrimp are heated through but not overcooked.
5. Season the dish with salt and chili sauce, stirring everything together until well combined.
6. Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the shrimp to cook evenly without becoming tough or chewy in texture.
